title: Dhevathayai Kanden Lyrics Kadhal Kondaen
stanzas:
dhevathayai kanden
kadhalil vizhundhen
en uyir udan kalandhu vittaal

nenjukkul nulaintdhal
moochinil nirainthaal
en mugavari maattri vaithaal

oru vannathu poochi
endhan vazhi thedi vanthathu
athan vannangal mattum
indru viralodu ullathu

theekkulle viral vaithaen
thani theevil kadai vaithaen
mannal veedu katti vaithaen

dhevathai dhevathai dhevathai dhevathai
aval oru dhevathai dhevathai
dhevathai dhevathai dhevathai

vizhi oramaai oru neer thuli
vazhiyuthe en kadhali
athan aalangal
nee unarnthal pothum
pothum pothum

azhiyamale oru niyabagam
azhai paayuthe enna kaaranam
arugamaiyil un vaasam veesinaal
suwaasam sooderidum

kadarkarai mele pookkum pookkal
koondhalai poi than serathe
ethanai kadhal ethanai aasai
thadam maaruthe
thadam maaruthe
adi boomi kanavu
udainthu poguthe

thozhiye oru nerathil
thozhile nee saigaiyil
aaviyaai manam paalai
pogum pogum

soliyaai ennai suzhattrinaal
soolnilai dhisai maattrinaai
kaanalaai un kadhal kanden
kannai kurudakkinaai

kaattrinil kizhiyum
ilai kalukkellam
kaattridam kobam kidaiyathu
unnidam kobam
ingu naan kondaal
engu naan povathu
ennaavathu en
vaazhvum thaazhvum
unnai servathu

dhevathayai kanden
kadhalil vizhundhen
en uyir udan kalandhu vittaal

nenjukkul nulaintdhal
moochinil nirainthaal
en mugavari maattri vaithaal

oru vannathu poochi
endhan vazhi thedi vanthathu
athan vannangal mattum
indru viralodu ullathu

theekkulle viral vaithaen
thani theevil kadai vaithaen
mannal veedu katti vaithaen

dhevathayai kanden
kadhalil vizhundhen
en uyir udan kalandhu vittaal

nenjukkul nulaintdhal
moochinil nirainthaal
en mugavari maattri vaithaal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Dhevathayai Kanden'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotions of a lover who feels connected to their beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kadhal Kondaen'?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's emotional turmoil and affection for their partner.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Harish Ragavendra and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Dhevathayai Kanden' released?

The song was released on July 4, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Dhevathayai Kanden', the protagonist expresses profound love and yearning, encapsulating the essence of romantic emotions. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create a nostalgic atmosphere, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. It beautifully conveys the struggles and joys of being in love, making it a perfect fit for moments of reflection and connection. This enchanting track remains a favorite for romantic occasions, evoking deep feelings in listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Dhevathayai Kanden from the movie Kadhal Kondaen is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Harish Ragavendra's soulful voice and Yuvan's enchanting composition, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. The heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar beautifully express the depths of romance, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: I saw a goddess and fell in love, if my life merges with hers.
If my heart is tied up and filled, if my face changes because of it.
A colored butterfly came searching for my path, only its colors remain with my finger today.
I placed my finger in the fire, I built a house with the sand.
Goddess, goddess, goddess, goddess, she is a goddess, goddess, goddess, goddess, goddess.
With my eyes, a drop of water flows, my love, if you understand, that is enough.
Without losing, a memory flows, what is the reason, if your presence blows near, my breath will be taken away.
On the seashore, flowers bloom, the waves do not come together, how much love, how much desire, do not change, do not change, the earth's dream is breaking apart.
Oh friend, at one moment, you are a disaster in my life, my heart will fade away.
By speaking, you have surrounded me, by changing directions, you have become blind to my love.
In the wind, the leaves fall, the anger does not go away, your anger is here, if I take it, where will I go, my life and my downfall are all about you.
I saw a goddess and fell in love, if my life merges with hers.
If my heart is tied up and filled, if my face changes because of it.
A colored butterfly came searching for my path, only its colors remain with my finger today.
I placed my finger in the fire, I built a house with the sand.
I saw a goddess and fell in love, if my life merges with hers.
If my heart is tied up and filled, if my face changes because of it.
